title: Probe: tabular comparison + numeric trend
note: Authored probe. Four regions each with three comparable measures is tabular by nature; a six-year single series is a chart. Both are laborious to build by hand and are where generation earns its keep.
licence: Authored for this suite; MIT with the repository.

expectedSlideTypes.because: four regions x three measures (consumption, prior year, connections)
renewable share as a six-point series from 2021 to 2026
headline figures: 1,596 GWh, 2.9 GW peak, 4.1% losses, 0.31 EUR/kWh

expectedCharacteristics: Renders the regional comparison as a table rather than prose bullets
Renders the renewable-share series as a chart
Does not invent figures beyond those given
